text: Financial performance in Q2 2025 demonstrates continued growth momentum, with revenue reaching $167.7 billion representing 7.73% year-over-year growth. Operating margin stood at 11.43% for the quarter, while net margin reached 10.83%, indicating improving profitability across the business. The company maintains a solid balance sheet position with a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.40 and current ratio of 1.02, suggesting adequate liquidity to fund ongoing operations and strategic investments.
